name: Garlic Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the softened butter, chives or parsley, and garlic powder.
2. Shape into a rectangle and cover. Freeze until firm for about 30 minutes.
3. Flatten each chicken breast to 1/4 inch thickness between waxed paper or plastic wrap.
4. Cut the butter into six pieces. Place one piece on the center of each chicken breast.
5. Fold the long sides over the butter, then fold the ends up and secure with a toothpick.
6. In a separate bowl, mix the crushed cornflakes, parsley, paprika, and garlic powder.
7. Dip each chicken breast into buttermilk, then coat evenly with the cereal mixture.
8. Place the chicken breasts, seam side down, in a greased pan.
9. Cook uncovered at 425°F for 35 minutes.
